prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford P5AT 3.2L Duratorq TDCi (GTDI) inline-5 diesel with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 600+ hp builds. Pair with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (84mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe from TurboSmart.

Full fuel system overhaul with a Bosch CP4.2 high-pressure fuel pump (modified for 2,200 bar rail pressure), 1000cc/min injectors from Denso (part #095000-7520), and a Radium Engineering dual-port fuel pressure regulator. ECU reflash via COBB Tuning Accessport with a custom map for E85 compatibility (flex-fuel sensor from Continental).

Drivetrain reinforcement with a ZF 8HP70 8-speed automatic transmission (from the Ford Ranger Raptor) with a PWR Performance transmission cooler, upgraded clutch pack from Sonnax, and a custom 4.10:1 ratio rear differential from Currie Enterprises (9-inch housing, ARB Air Locker, 35-spline axles).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works BT-50 kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber side skirts, and a vented hood with heat extractors). Front bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed splitter from Rocket Bunny (polyurethane, 3-piece design with adjustable canards).

Suspension lift via a Dobinsons 3-inch lift kit (monotube shocks, heavy-duty springs) paired with Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (remote reservoirs, 3-way adjustable damping) for mixed on/off-road use. Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10 +15 offset (ET15) with Toyo Open Country R/T Trail 35x12.50R20 tires.

Exterior lighting upgraded to Morimoto XB LED headlights (projector-style, 5500K color temperature) and a custom rear light bar from Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro 50-inch, amber/driving combo). Interior: Recaro Pole Position seats (cloth/Alcantara, FIA-approved), custom roll cage from Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, bolt-in design), and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub.
